name: Memoria
description: Memoria-backed long-term memory plugin for OpenClaw powered by the Rust memoria CLI and API.

backend.label: Backend Mode
backend.help: embedded runs the Rust memoria CLI locally against MatrixOne; api connects directly to the Memoria REST API over HTTP.

dbUrl.label: MatrixOne Connection String
dbUrl.help: Embedded mode only. Rust Memoria expects a MySQL DSN; old mysql+pymysql:// values are normalized automatically.

memoriaExecutable.label: Memoria Executable
memoriaExecutable.help: Path or command name for the Rust memoria CLI.

defaultUserId.label: Default User ID
defaultUserId.help: Single-user quick-start identity used unless userIdStrategy derives one from the OpenClaw runtime context.

userIdStrategy.label: User ID Strategy
userIdStrategy.help: config keeps one shared Memoria user; agentId or sessionKey derive the identity from OpenClaw runtime context.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into the prompt before each run.

autoObserve.label: Auto-Observe
autoObserve.help: Automatically extract memories from recent conversation turns at agent_end.

retrieveTopK.label: Recall Top K
retrieveTopK.help: Maximum number of memories returned for memory_search and auto-recall.

recallMinPromptLength.label: Recall Min Length
recallMinPromptLength.help: Prompts shorter than this are skipped for auto-recall.

includeCrossSession.label: Cross-Session Recall
includeCrossSession.help: Compatibility flag retained from the Python plugin. Rust MCP currently uses the upstream default retrieval behavior.

retrieveMemoryTypes.label: Memory Types
retrieveMemoryTypes.help: Compatibility hint retained from the Python plugin. Rust MCP currently ignores this filter.

observeTailMessages.label: Observe Tail Messages
observeTailMessages.help: Number of recent user/assistant messages forwarded to memory_observe.

observeMaxChars.label: Observe Max Chars
observeMaxChars.help: Maximum total characters forwarded to memory_observe.

timeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for Rust Memoria CLI requests in milliseconds.

maxListPages.label: List Scan Limit
maxListPages.help: Used by OpenClaw-side fallback scans for memory_get and derived stats.

embeddingProvider.label: Embedding Provider
embeddingProvider.help: Embedded mode only. Prebuilt Rust release binaries are typically used with openai-compatible embedding services.

embeddingBaseUrl.label: Embedding Base URL
embeddingBaseUrl.help: Embedded mode only. Optional for official OpenAI; required for compatible gateways.

embeddingApiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embeddingApiKey.help: Embedded mode only. Required for OpenAI-compatible providers unless you built Memoria with local-embedding.

embeddingDim.label: Embedding Dimensions
embeddingDim.help: Embedded mode only. Set this before first startup so Memoria creates the right schema.

llmApiKey.label: Observer LLM API Key
llmApiKey.help: Optional. Enables auto-observe extraction and internal LLM-backed Memoria tools.

llmBaseUrl.label: Observer LLM Base URL
llmBaseUrl.help: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for embedded auto-observe and reflection flows.

llmModel.label: Observer LLM Model
llmModel.help: Model used by embedded auto-observe and internal reflection/entity extraction.
